articles.title: Gränges sets 2026 growth targets at capital markets day following record 2025 operating profit
articles.summary: Gränges held its Capital Markets Day in Stockholm on June 2, reporting that 2025 was a record year for operating profit driven by market share gains and volume growth; management set a 2026 target of low-to-mid single-digit sales volume growth, underpinned by the successful ramp-up of its new Shandong, China facility.
articles.novelis_angle: Gränges' record automotive heat-exchanger volumes and China expansion confirm robust downstream aluminium demand in EV thermal management — a segment adjacent to Novelis's battery enclosure and automotive sheet business in Europe.

articles.title: Meadow launches aluminium-based refill system for consumer goods market
articles.summary: Startup Meadow launched an aluminium-based refillable packaging system for consumer goods brands designed to meet EU Packaging and Packaging Waste Regulation (PPWR) and California SB54 mandates requiring refillable formats, positioning aluminium as a preferred material for sustainable consumer packaging.
articles.novelis_angle: EU PPWR is driving aluminium adoption in consumer goods beyond traditional can sheet, creating emerging FRP specialty demand in refillable formats that could expand Novelis's European addressable market.

articles.title: Geopolitical uncertainties persist as domestic and international aluminium prices diverge in volatile trading
articles.summary: International aluminium prices have held above $3,600/t due to Middle East naval blockade impacts on Gulf smelters, while Chinese domestic prices remain at a discount from overcapacity, creating a persistent divergence that is reshaping global aluminium trade flows heading into mid-2026.
